title: Cracking NDA 2026: Comprehensive Syllabus and Preparation Strategy
author: DefenceRoger Editorial
data: The National Defence Academy (NDA) exam conducted by UPSC is the premier gateway for 10+2 aspirants to join the Army, Navy, and Air Force. Preparing for the written exam requires a structured approach focusing on Mathematics (300 marks) and the General Ability Test (GAT, 600 marks). In this guide, we break down high-yielding math topics like Trigonometry, Calculus, and English. Aspiring officers should build a robust daily study schedule, focus heavily on NCERT basics, and solve at least 10 years of previous year question papers (PYQs) to master the time constraints of the UPSC exam.
